_comment: Introduction pseudo-chapter (INTRO books). Welcome/Chapter Structure text verbatim from the running original. Navigation page is REWRITTEN app copy per A2 decision (c) (2026-07-17). Audio roles verified: see audioInventory.
title: Introduction

content.text: WELCOME -- Greek Tutor attempts to harness the power of interactive multimedia to ease and enhance the learning of New Testament Greek. The author designed the program to be intuitive. It requires no computer skills other than pointing and clicking a mouse to access the topics of study or to respond to drill questions. Interactive multimedia has advantages both for the student and for the instructor.

The chapters of Greek Tutor will take you through the basics of Greek (alphabet, nouns, verbs, etc.) into an easy reading approach to the book of John. Several appendices will help you to build your vocabulary and to reinforce your learning.
This program will work in conjunction with several textbooks. There is a mini-tutorial which explains how to navigate through the program. -- ENJOY
Each chapter is built around four levels of learning:

items.label: Learn Menu
items.text: introduces and teaches you the new material;

items.label: Drill Menu
items.text: allows you to practice in a multiple choice format;

items.label: Exercise Menu
items.text: gives you detailed practice in spelling out words; and

items.label: Quick Review
items.text: charts and verses designed for quick review.

learn.title: Navigation
learn._userDecision: A2 decided 2026-07-17: option (c), rewritten copy. Draft below written by Claude, awaiting Fable's approval -- the in-app 'draft copy' tag renders while this key is present; delete this key once the wording is approved.

content.text: Greek Tutor is arranged in chapters. Each chapter is a map of pages grouped into the four levels of learning.

items.label: Section tabs
items.text: the bar at the bottom of the screen jumps to the Learn, Drill, Exercise, or Quick Review section of the current chapter.

items.label: Previous / Next
items.text: the buttons at the bottom of every page walk through the chapter in order, weaving each lesson together with its drills and exercises.

items.label: Chapter map
items.text: the back arrow at the top left returns to the chapter's map, which lists every page and shows your progress.

items.label: Table of Contents
items.text: the list icon at the top right returns to the list of chapters at any time.

content.text: Wherever you see Greek, tap it to hear it pronounced.
